meaning: n.逃,逃亡,溢出设备,出口,逃跑,[植]野生vi.逃脱,避开,溜走vt.逃避,避免,被忘掉
examples: They made no attempt to escape.
She was lucky to escape punishment.
Sales of Ford's Escape hybrid SUV were up more than 50 percent last month.
Alcatraz was considered escape-proof, but in 1962 the Anglin brothers and Frank Morris disappeared on a raft.
